article.title: Uber(L4) SDE-2 Offer Details
article.content:
Company: Uber
Level: SDE-2(L4)
Location: India
Base: 45L
Stocks: 50K USD for 4 Years
Bonus: 0-14L(Avg 7L)
Benefits: Standard Benefits of Uber
Total TC for 1st Yr: 62L

YOE: 2.5 Yrs
Prev Company: Microsoft
Prev Comp: 30L
Education: Bachelors from a Top8 IIT

Thanks to The Community for Helping me with the interview prep.

post.content: can you share your interview exp , specifically HLD round
Can you share prep materials & strategy?
why are the stocks so low. This is equal to university grad grant
did you negotiate or had counter offers ? this is 100% jump in TC
Congratulations Bro!! Just a quick question, Your previous compensation has stocks as well or it is only base ?
How did you apply for the job? Referral or career portal or they approached you?
